hooks.command: staged=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); cli_go=$(echo "$staged" | grep -E '^(cmd/|internal/cli/).*\.go$'); docs=$(echo "$staged" | grep -E '^(README\.md|docs/)'); if [ -n "$cli_go" ] && [ -z "$docs" ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"CLI-facing Go files changed but no docs updated. Verify README.md reflects any command, flag, or behavior changes."}}'; fi
